title: paspalum auricomum
intro: Paspalum auricomum, also known as the golden panic grass, is a tropical grass species native to the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum auricomum include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Paspalum auricomum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in some traditional herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
